errorPatterns.name: npe
errorPatterns.suggestion: Check for null references before accessing object members

errorPatterns.name: import_error
errorPatterns.suggestion: Install the missing package using pip or check the module name

errorPatterns.name: attribute_error
errorPatterns.suggestion: Check that the object has the expected attribute and is not None

errorPatterns.name: type_error
errorPatterns.suggestion: Check the types of variables and ensure they are defined before use

errorPatterns.name: index_out_of_range
errorPatterns.suggestion: Check slice/array bounds before accessing elements

errorPatterns.name: panic
errorPatterns.suggestion: Handle the error case with recover or proper error handling

errorPatterns.name: panic
errorPatterns.suggestion: Handle the error case with Result/Option types instead of panicking

commonPatterns.name: out_of_memory
commonPatterns.suggestion: Increase JVM heap size with -Xmx or optimize memory usage to reduce allocations

commonPatterns.name: unknown_error
commonPatterns.suggestion: Review the error message and stack trace for clues about the root cause
